### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.2`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2)

#### What's Changed

-   Allow empty list of nameservers by [@​jandubois](https://redirect.github.com/jandubois) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/443](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/443)
-   Sync DNS Resolver Nameserver List by [@​fatanugraha](https://redirect.github.com/fatanugraha) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/450](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/450)
-   Fix `PortsForwarder.Expose()` proxy check by [@​cpick](https://redirect.github.com/cpick) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/441](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/441)
-   Fix small error typo by [@​cpick](https://redirect.github.com/cpick) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/440](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/440)
-   Warn user and keep executing if Event Log Service is stopped by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/442](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/442)
-   Tests: basic implementation for testing against vfkit by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/427](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/427)
-   Run unit tests on linux by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/457](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/457)

#### Dependencies updates

-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.29.0 to 0.31.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/438](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/438)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.28.0 to 0.29.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/445](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/445)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.36.0 to 1.36.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/444](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/444)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.31.0 to 0.32.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/448](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/448)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​cpick](https://redirect.github.com/cpick) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/440](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/440)
-   [@​jandubois](https://redirect.github.com/jandubois) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/443](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/443)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2

</details>
